beefs.title: Melat Kiros
beefs.about: Has anything changed since Wikipedia:Articles for deletion/Melat Kiros? Unelected politicians aren't generally notable even if they've won the primary in a strongly partisan seat - Wikipedia notability guidelines don't predict the future like that
quotes: Has anything changed since Wikipedia:Articles for deletion/Melat Kiros? Unelected politicians aren't generally notable even if they've won the primary in a strongly partisan seat - Wikipedia notability guidelines don't predict the future like that

WP:OTHERSTUFFEXISTS. It's wrong on every single one of those pages for reasons that have been explained multiples times over and again while excited mostly new users have intransigently added them back in defiance of them. It's clutter and not what the field is for and does not belong any more than any other similar non-party membership org nonprofit that would obviously not belong.
